allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.FriendlyName -match 'Samsung|Galaxy|Android|ADB' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.Class -eq 'WPD' -or \\$_.Class -eq 'USB' -or \\$_.Class -eq 'AndroidUsbDeviceClass' } | Where-Object { \\$_.Status -eq 'OK' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.Class -eq 'WPD' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.FriendlyName -match 'MTP|Galaxy|phone|SAMSUNG' -and \\$_.Status -ne 'Unknown' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { \\$_.InstanceId -match 'VID_04E8' } | Format-Table Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId -AutoSize" 2>&1)
Bash($ADB -s emulator-5554 shell am start -n com.flowclear.app/.MainActivity)
Bash($ADB -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.flowclear.app)
